project:
4.0.0
org.example OOP111 1.0-SNAPSHOT
23 23 UTF-8
com.sun.mail jakarta.mail 2.0.1
1) pom.xml‑a Maven project‑aa link pannunga IntelliJ la pom.xml file open pannunga. Tab title mela (top) pom.xml pakkathula chinna elephant icon (Maven) irukka nu paathukkonga: Illa na, right‑click pom.xml → “Add as Maven Project” / “Link Maven Project” nu irukkum, adha click pannunga.
